AboutSection.bio1: Passionate about software development, I have been directing my professional growth toward continuous improvement in programming, code best practices, and system architecture.
AboutSection.bio2: Drawing on my background in infrastructure and systems analysis, I developed a comprehensive view of the application lifecycle. I am transitioning into full-stack development, focusing on Blazor, React, TypeScript, and C# with the goal of becoming a versatile, results-driven developer.

TimelineSection.job1Desc: Hardware and user support, network maintenance, and Raspberry Pi configuration for internal city hall solutions.
TimelineSection.job2Desc: Installation and support in Linux and Windows environments, database backup and restore, flowchart scripts, Docker Compose, Ruby, and customer support.
TimelineSection.job3Title: ERP Analyst — Mercantil Fonte Boa Distribuição
TimelineSection.job3Desc: Monitoring and optimizing the Consinco ERP (TOTVS), Oracle database management, access control, and process automation with Python scripts.
TimelineSection.job4Desc: Built an internal ticketing system from scratch, created dashboards, worked with Laravel MVC architecture, and provided support for vehicle tracking platforms with GALILEOSKY.
TimelineSection.job5Desc: Network administration (Cisco, MikroTik, Sophos), firewalls (pfSense, Fortinet), VPNs, Windows Server with AD/GPO, monitoring via Zabbix and Grafana, and corporate backup with Veeam and rsync. Transitioning to development with Blazor, React, TypeScript, and C#.

CertificatesSection.subtitulo: Courses and certifications completed throughout my journey.

ContactSection.subtitulo: Ready to build something extraordinary together?
